name: com.lvn.engine
description: Write narrative games for Unity as plain text. Drop a .lvns script into Assets/ and Elvin runs it as a real game — dialogue, branching choices, characters with emotions, stats, animation, save/load — with no dialogue or branching system to build yourself. Plays the open .lvn container; also imports Ink and articy.

samples.description: Press Play to see a game: add the ElvinVnStageSample component (story + theme bundled). Also includes HelloLvnRunner, a headless console host. See docs/unity-getting-started.md.

The complete anatomy of an Elvin plugin: a custom `ext` op with Hold/Resume flow control (LvnOps.Register), a quick-menu item, the ext-grammar.json declaration that makes the validator and IDE treat your ops like built-ins, a playable demo scene, and a README on shipping it as your own UPM package.
